content:
# Paleomagnetic Pole

**Summary**: The position of the magnetic pole at a specific time in the past.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] calculated paleomagnetic-poles to determine the rotation history of the Arabian plate.

## Scientific Context

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] Used to track tectonic plate movement over millions of years.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] Fisher statistics applied to site-mean directions.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The calculated pole position for central Harrat Rahat lies at latitude 86.74 N and longitude 345.49 E. ([[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993, p. 64]])
